definitions.usage_example: In addition to English, he speaks French.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE in addition to AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In addition to English, he speaks French.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para añadir otro ítem o pieza de información.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to add another item or piece of information.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: En nombre de / De parte de]
definitions.usage_example: I am speaking on behalf of my team.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE on behalf of AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I am speaking on behalf of my team.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Como representante de alguien o para el beneficio de alguien.]
definitions.usage_context_es: As a representative of someone or for someone's benefit.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Antes de / Previo a (formal)]
definitions.usage_example: Please finish the report prior to the meeting.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE prior to AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Please finish the report prior to the meeting.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Una forma formal de decir 'antes de' un tiempo o evento específico.]
definitions.usage_context_es: A formal way to say 'before' a specific time or event.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Con respecto a / Sobre]
definitions.usage_example: I have a question concerning your report.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I have a question concerning your report.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Sobre el tema de o en conexión con; acerca de.]
definitions.usage_context_es: On the subject of or in connection with; about.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Con respecto a / En cuanto a]
definitions.usage_example: Regarding the contract, we agree to the terms.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Regarding the contract, we agree to the terms.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Con respecto a; en cuanto a.]
